zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes of Brandenburg於1257年出生在德國布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特武比高明陳時，她的父親Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg44歲，母親Jutta II of Saxony29歲。她於大約1273年與Eric V of Denmark在瑞典結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年9月29日在丹麥索洛林斯泰德享年47歲，埋葬在丹麥索洛林斯泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes of Brandenburg于1257年出生在德国布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特武比高明陳时，她的父亲Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg44岁，母亲Jutta II of Saxony29岁。她于大约1273年与Eric V of Denmark在瑞典结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年9月29日在丹麦索洛林斯泰德享年47岁，埋葬在丹麦索洛林斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes of Brandenburg was born in 1257, in München, Uebigau, Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germany, her father, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, was 44 and her mother, Jutta II of Saxony, was 29. She married Eric V of Denmark about 1273, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 29 September 1304, in Ringsted, Sorø, Denmark, at the age of 47, and was buried in Ringsted, Sorø, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes of Brandenburg est née en 1257, à München, Uebigau, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Jutta II of Saxony, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Eric V of Denmark environ 1273, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1304, à Ringsted, Sorø, Danemark, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Ringsted, Sorø, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes of Brandenburg 1257 in München, Uebigau, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg 44 und ihre Mutter Jutta II of Saxony 29. Sie hat um 1273 in Schweden Eric V of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. September 1304 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Ringsted, Sorø, Dänemark und wurde in Ringsted, Sorø, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes of Brandenburg è nata il nel 1257 nel München, Uebigau, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germania, sua padre, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Jutta II of Saxony, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Eric V of Denmark circa 1273, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1304, nel Ringsted, Sorø, Danimarca, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Ringsted, Sorø, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes of Brandenburgが1257年にドイツブランデンブルグランドクレイス エルベ-エルスターウエビガウムuンチェンで生まれた時，父Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburgは44歳，母Jutta II of Saxonyは29歳であった。約1273年にスウェーデンでEric V of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年9月29日にデンマークソルoリングステドで47歳で死去し，デンマークソルoリングステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes of Brandenburg(이)가 1257년 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 엘브-스터 비가 u천에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta II of Saxony(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1273년 스웨덴에서 Eric V of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 9월 29일 덴마크 소o 링스테드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 소o 링스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes of Brandenburg nasceu em 1257, em München, Uebigau, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Jutta II of Saxony, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Eric V of Denmark aproximadamente 1273, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1304, em Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes of Brandenburg родилась в 1257 г. в местности мuнчэн, уебигау, ландкрис элбе-елстир, брэнденбург, Германия, её отцу по имени Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Jutta II of Saxony, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eric V of Denmark около 1273 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 29 сентября 1304 г. в местности рингстед, сорo, Дания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности рингстед, сорo, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes of Brandenburg nació en 1257, en München, Uebigau, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemania, su papá, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Jutta II of Saxony, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eric V of Denmark aproximadamente 1273, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1304, en Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca.
